sections.label: Verse 1
lines: When shadows rise and evil reigns,
Who will stand to break the chains?
The earth quakes under wicked hands,
Yet justice whispers through the lands.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Is there none to hear the cry,
When the innocent question why?

sections.label: Chorus
lines: The Lord is my refuge, my strength in despair,
He lifts the broken with merciful care.
When vengeance belongs to the Maker alone,
Truth will resound from His heavenly throne.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The proud declare their ruthless creed,
They mock the cries of those in need.
Yet silent eyes, divine and wise,
Mark every tear, each unseen lie.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Though the wicked rise, though justice seems slow,
A fire is kindled where winds do not blow.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: The Lord is my refuge, my strength in despair,
He lifts the broken with merciful care.
When vengeance belongs to the Maker alone,
Truth will resound from His heavenly throne.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh foolish hearts who plant the seed,
Do you think He will not see?
The Maker of ears, the sculptor of sight,
Knows every thought concealed by night.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: The Lord is my refuge, my strength in despair,
He lifts the broken with merciful care.
When vengeance belongs to the Maker alone,
Truth will resound from His heavenly throne.

sections.label: Outro
lines: In the silence, the righteous stand,
Held by the justice of His hand.
